hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push|gh pr create'; then echo 'Running pre-push checks (bun typecheck && bun run test)...' >&2; cd /Users/mav/Documents/Projects/Experiments/vibes/t3code && bun typecheck && bun run test || { echo 'Pre-push checks failed. Fix errors before pushing.' >&2; exit 2; }; fi
